examples: Hook tried a more ingratiating manner.
He said this with an ingratiating smile.
But by the new century he was ingratiating himself.
Lastly, he became much more end-customer-centric, spending time on customer calls, while also ingratiating himself to the field employees.
Learning to negotiate a hard-bargain without being ingratiating and without trading power for sympathy is not beyond the ability of women.
